queries.name: AI 视频生成与剪辑
queries.query: AI video generation OR video editing OR text to video
queries.why: 寻找能帮助短视频生产、自动剪辑、视频生成的工具

queries.name: AI 图片与商品素材
queries.query: "AI image generation" OR "background removal" OR "product photography"
queries.why: 寻找商品图、场景图、抠图、素材生成相关工具

queries.name: 浏览器自动化与采集
queries.query: "browser automation" OR "web scraping" OR playwright OR crawler
queries.why: 寻找可用于信息抓取、网页自动检查、竞品观察的工具

queries.name: 电商与评论分析
queries.query: ecommerce OR "product review" OR "sentiment analysis" OR "review analysis"
queries.why: 寻找选品、评论分析、商品洞察相关项目

queries.name: AI Agent 与工作流自动化
queries.why: 寻找可串联选品、脚本、素材、发布流程的自动化工具

queries.name: 中文 AI 工具
queries.query: "Chinese AI" OR douyin OR tiktok OR "AI tool"
queries.why: 寻找中文生态里更容易落地的 AI 工具和项目
